docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $925.00 FILED BY BARRETT, RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TRAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2012 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-01-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF RUTH BARRETT RE: INCLUDE 2 OTHER COMPANIES - ALT CHARGE AND VIP WHOLESALE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRETT, RUTH
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $925.00 FILED BY BARRETT, RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TRAVEL ALT CHARGE VIP WHOLESALE
